subcodes.first_line: In every year have the fragrances of the eternal vesture wafted over thee from the realms of oneness, and particularly the divine verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در هر سنه نفحات قمیص باقیه از شطر احدیه بر تو مرور نموده و آیات الهیه مخصوصا
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
